description: Common Avatar Builder is a component that is part of every world that defines the spawning behavior and routines to do for all users when they spawn into a world. This can be used to add world settings menus, change what parts of a user get automatically set up, and so on.

fields.LoadCloudAvatars: Whether to load the User's set avatar, or load the default avatar instead.
fields.CustomAvatarTemplates: Avatars that user's will spawn into if they don't have a cloud avatar, or optionally force them into one of these templates.
fields.AutoInject: A slot that will automatically be duplicated and added as a child of a user when they join the world. Certain components will use this to override user behavior when part of this slot's hierarchy, like Avatar Audio Configuration to name one.
fields.SetupNameBadges: Whether to set up the user's default name badge when they spawn
fields.SetupIconBadges: Whether to set up the user's default badges when they spawn.
fields.SetupLocomotion: Whether to give the user the default locomotion modules when they spawn.
fields.AllowLocomotion: Whether to allow the user to move using locomotion when they spawn.
fields.DefaultHostSilenced: Whether the user should be default muted to the host when they spawn.
fields.DefaultClientSilenced: Whether the user should be default muted on their end when they spawn.
fields.LocomotionModules: The slot full of locomotion modules that the user will have by default after they spawn.
fields.ForceDefaultLocomotionModule: The locomotion to enable for the user by default when spawning rather than the one in that user's locomotion settings set in their dash.
fields.FindUserPreferredModule: Whether to try to spawn the user into their preferred locomotion module they set in settings.
fields.SetupItemShelves: Whether to add item shelves to the user when they spawn.
fields.ParentClientsToServer: Parents users that join under the host user's slot (yes this is what it does)
fields.AlignTracking: used in Kiosk mode in dash space to show Debug tracking visuals
fields.EmptyAvatarSlotHandler: Uses this component to handle empty slots like head and hands on a spawning avatar.
fields.FillEmptySlots: Whether to fill empty AvatarObjectSlots with default head and hand objects if they are missing on their loaded avatar.

methods.UpdateLocomotionModules: Updates the locomotion modules on every user with the ones specified with this component.

notes.title: Behavior
notes.text: This component gets read and executed every time a user respawns or joins into a world.
